SEARCH
Package grafioschtrader.algo

Class AlgoTopCreateFromPortfolio

java.lang.Object
grafiosch.entities.BaseID<Integer>
grafiosch.entities.TenantBaseID
grafioschtrader.entities.AlgoTopAssetSecurity
grafioschtrader.entities.AlgoTop
grafioschtrader.algo.AlgoTopCreate
grafioschtrader.algo.AlgoTopCreateFromPortfolio
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class AlgoTopCreateFromPortfolio extends AlgoTopCreate
DTO for auto-generating an AlgoTop hierarchy from the tenant's current portfolio holdings at a given reference date. Extends AlgoTopCreate so the existing saveOnlyAttributes() dispatch can detect this subclass.
